title: Expose swarm cleanup working_dir preview
goal: Implement the next issue #13 safety slice: expose swarm member working_dir metadata so list and cleanup dry-run previews show which worktree/path a scoped cleanup would affect.
permissions: Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build
completionConditions: `AgentInfo` carries optional `working_dir` from swarm member state
`swarm list` metadata and `swarm cleanup dry_run=true` output include working_dir when known
Existing swarm formatting/tests are updated and focused tests pass
No live cleanup/stop behavior is changed
failureTaxonomy: Breaking protocol serde compatibility for old clients
Adding noisy output when working_dir is absent
notes: Keep this additive and read-only. Do not change candidate selection or perform any cleanup. Preserve existing behavior when working_dir is missing.
